all.en: Model name, AeroPrint X9 wireless multifunction office printer.
all.zh: 型號名稱：AeroPrint X9 無線多功能辦公印表機。

all.en: Manufacturer, Nordlux Imaging Systems, based in Stockholm, Sweden.
all.zh: 製造商：Nordlux Imaging Systems，總部位於瑞典斯德哥爾摩。

all.en: Release date, the first quarter of fiscal year 2026.
all.zh: 上市日期：2026 會計年度第一季。

all.en: The unit prints up to forty pages per minute in black and white.
all.zh: 本機黑白列印速度最高每分鐘 40 頁。

all.en: Color output runs at thirty-two pages per minute under standard mode.
all.zh: 標準模式下彩色輸出速度為每分鐘 32 頁。

all.en: Native resolution is twelve hundred by twelve hundred dots per inch.
all.zh: 原生解析度為 1200 x 1200 DPI。

all.en: The toner cartridges yield approximately nine thousand pages each.
all.zh: 每組碳粉匣可印約 9,000 頁。

all.en: Paper trays support sizes from A6 up to legal sheets.
all.zh: 紙匣支援尺寸從 A6 到 Legal 規格。

all.en: An optional second tray adds five hundred sheets of capacity.
all.zh: 可選配第二紙匣，增加 500 張容量。

all.en: The duplex unit prints both sides without manual reloading.
all.zh: 雙面列印單元無須手動翻面即可雙面輸出。

all.en: Connectivity options include gigabit Ethernet and Wi-Fi six.
all.zh: 連線方式包含 Gigabit 乙太網路與 Wi-Fi 6。

all.en: USB type C is provided for direct laptop connections.
all.zh: 提供 USB Type-C 介面以便筆電直連。

all.en: Mobile printing works through AirPrint and Mopria certified apps.
all.zh: 行動列印可透過 AirPrint 與 Mopria 認證應用程式運作。

all.en: The seven inch color touchscreen supports gesture navigation.
all.zh: 7 吋彩色觸控螢幕支援手勢操作。

all.en: Security features include encrypted hard drive and badge release printing.
all.zh: 安全功能包含加密硬碟及識別證取件列印。

all.en: The administrator portal allows remote firmware updates over HTTPS.
all.zh: 管理員入口可透過 HTTPS 進行遠端韌體更新。

all.en: Power consumption averages 1.3 watts in deep sleep mode.
all.zh: 深度睡眠模式下平均耗電 1.3 瓦。

all.en: The device meets Energy Star and EPEAT Gold certifications.
all.zh: 本裝置符合 Energy Star 及 EPEAT 金級認證。

all.en: Operating noise stays below fifty-two decibels during normal use.
all.zh: 正常使用時的運作噪音低於 52 分貝。

all.en: Physical dimensions measure 480 by 510 by 420 millimeters.
all.zh: 機身尺寸為 480 x 510 x 420 公釐。

all.en: Net weight is twenty-eight kilograms without paper loaded.
all.zh: 未裝紙時淨重為 28 公斤。

all.en: The warranty covers parts and labor for three full years.
all.zh: 保固涵蓋零件與工時，期間為完整三年。

all.en: On-site service is available in major metropolitan areas worldwide.
all.zh: 全球主要都會區均提供到府服務。

all.en: For full datasheets, please visit our partner portal at nordlux dot com.
all.zh: 完整規格表請至我們的夥伴入口網站 nordlux dot com。

all.en: Volume discounts begin at orders of twenty-five units or more.
all.zh: 訂購 25 台以上即享有量販折扣。

all.en: Trade-in programs accept eligible competitor models from approved brands.
all.zh: 以舊換新方案接受指定品牌的合格競品機型。

all.en: Optional finishing accessories include staplers and a hole-punch module.
all.zh: 可選配的後處理配件包含釘書機與打孔模組。

all.en: The cloud connector links with Google Drive and Microsoft SharePoint.
all.zh: 雲端連結器可串接 Google Drive 與 Microsoft SharePoint。

all.en: Scan-to-email supports LDAP lookup against corporate directories.
all.zh: 掃描寄送電子郵件支援企業目錄 LDAP 查詢。

all.en: Built-in OCR converts scanned pages into searchable PDF files.
all.zh: 內建 OCR 可將掃描頁面轉換為可搜尋的 PDF 檔案。

all.en: Recyclable packaging reduces foam content by sixty percent overall.
all.zh: 可回收包裝整體減少了 60% 的發泡材使用。

all.en: Spare parts remain available for seven years after model discontinuation.
all.zh: 機型停產後備品仍可供應七年。

all.en: Pre-order requests should be submitted through your regional account manager.
all.zh: 預購請透過您所屬區域的客戶經理提出。

all.en: Thank you for considering AeroPrint X9 for your office workflow needs.
all.zh: 感謝您考慮選用 AeroPrint X9 滿足您的辦公流程需求。

all.en: Demonstration units can be loaned to qualified buyers for two weeks.
all.zh: 合格買家可借用展示機種兩週試用。

all.en: Each demo includes full setup and onboarding by a certified engineer.
all.zh: 每台展示機皆由認證工程師完成完整安裝與導入。

all.en: Service plans include quarterly preventive maintenance visits at no extra cost.
all.zh: 服務方案含每季預防性維護到府服務，無須額外付費。

all.en: Replacement parts ship within forty-eight hours under our premium agreement.
all.zh: 依高階合約規範，更換零件將於 48 小時內出貨。

all.en: Optional staff training covers daily operation and basic troubleshooting tasks.
all.zh: 可選用員工培訓，內容涵蓋日常操作與基礎故障排除。

all.en: Mobile app dashboards display real-time toner levels and job queues.
all.zh: 行動應用程式儀表板即時顯示碳粉量與列印佇列。

all.en: Reporting tools track print volume by department for chargeback purposes.
all.zh: 報表工具按部門追蹤列印量，便於成本分攤。

all.en: Custom paper profiles can be created and saved for recurring print jobs.
all.zh: 可建立並儲存自訂紙張設定檔以供重複列印作業使用。

all.en: Bulk firmware deployment is supported via our enterprise management console.
all.zh: 支援透過企業管理主控台批次部署韌體。

all.en: Contact your regional representative today to arrange a personalized demonstration.
all.zh: 請即刻聯繫您所屬區域代表，安排專屬展示。
